Description: Apply the onboarding, support-resolution, and product-adoption assumptions together to the same baseline top-quartile risk cohort.
Increase onboarding completion by 10 percentage points, bounded at 100%, for the baseline top-quartile risk cohort.
Reduce support resolution time by 25%, with a 0.25-day floor, for the baseline top-quartile risk cohort.
Increase adopted products by one, bounded at eight, for the baseline top-quartile risk cohort.
Apply no feature changes to the baseline target cohort. Expected hazard and survival movement should be zero within numerical tolerance.
Increase support resolution time by 25% and add one service incident, within governed bounds, to verify adverse bidirectional sensitivity for the same cohort.
